data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for customer-safe fallback for false positives.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of a 'customer-safe fallback for false positives' as part of the saga. However, the evidence does not provide any specific mention or confirmation of such a fallback mechanism being implemented or functional. The linked use case outlines the need for this fallback but lacks concrete evidence to assert its coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or availability of customer-safe fallback for false positives.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the customer-safe fallback for false positives.
